query:
-- Desativar opções duplicadas nos grupos Turbine das marmitex P, M, G
UPDATE menu_addon_options co
JOIN menu_addon_groups cg ON cg.id = co.groupId
SET co.isActive = 0
WHERE cg.name LIKE '%Turbine%' 
  AND cg.menuItemId IN (150008, 150009, 150010)
  AND co.id >= 30000;

-- Verificar resultado: quantas opções ativas restaram
SELECT cg.id, cg.name, COUNT(co.id) as active_opts
FROM menu_addon_groups cg
JOIN menu_addon_options co ON co.groupId = cg.id AND co.isActive = 1
WHERE cg.name LIKE '%Turbine%' AND cg.menuItemId IN (150008, 150009, 150010)
GROUP BY cg.id, cg.name;
